title: CF_DocCentralV3_SendForApproval — Power Apps V2 Trigger Input Schema
description: Input parameters for CF_DocCentralV3_SendForApproval. Called from the Canvas App when the initiator submits a document for approval. The approval chain is NOT passed by the caller — it is read from ProcesConfig in App Config by the flow, preventing Canvas App override.

documentItemId.description: SharePoint item ID from Svi predmeti for the document being submitted for approval.

delovodniBroj.description: Registry number of the document (e.g. '42/2026'). Used in audit log entries and notification email subjects.

documentType.description: Document type string. Used to look up the correct ProcesConfig from App Config. Must match an App Config entry.

initiatorEmail.description: Email of the user submitting the document for approval. Retained on the document item as InicijatorEmail and used to notify on rejection or completion.

initiatorDisplayName.description: Display name of the initiator. Used in notification emails.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID from the caller. If empty, the flow generates a new GUID.

callerNotes.calledBy: Canvas App — document detail screen or scrNoviPredmet after document creation
callerNotes.approvalChainSource: ProcesConfig in App Config — read by the flow, never passed by the Canvas App
callerNotes.preconditions: Document must exist in Svi predmeti. Stanje must NOT be 'U odobravanju' or 'Arhivirano'.
callerNotes.resubmissionNote: May be called again after rejection (Stanje = 'Odbijeno'). The flow preserves existing IstorijaOdobravanjaJson and appends a RoundReset marker before resetting KoraciOdobravanjaJson.
